summary.title: Bedrock Lambda GitHub PR Review App Architecture
summary.description:
This document describes a GitHub App that reviews pull requests using AWS Bedrock and Lambda.
The authored functional architecture remains stable while deployment/runtime/code evidence is inferred
from infrastructure manifests, source files, and verification artifacts.

threats.mitigation: Publication redaction pipeline blocks common secret shapes and is being extended.
